eval_dimensions.name: Correct Delegation
eval_dimensions.description: Invokes Dev10x:plugin-maintenance in full mode after running config migrate; does NOT run maintenance steps inline

eval_dimensions.name: Config Migration Step
eval_dimensions.description: Runs 'dev10x config migrate' as Step 1 before delegating; skips gracefully if already migrated

eval_dimensions.name: Version Recording
eval_dimensions.description: Calls mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__record_upgrade after a successful maintenance pass; skips if maintenance reported failures

eval_dimensions.name: Trigger Guard
eval_dimensions.description: Does NOT invoke when permissions are working correctly; steers user to Dev10x:plugin-maintenance bootstrap for fast subset

evals.name: post-upgrade-happy-path
evals.description: Standard post-upgrade invocation. Plugin version changed, config at legacy paths. Full maintenance pass should run and version should be recorded.

assertions.text: Calls mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__record_upgrade after maintenance pass succeeds
Does NOT run maintenance sub-steps inline (update-paths, ensure-base, etc.) — delegates entirely

evals.name: maintenance-failure-skips-version-record
evals.description: Maintenance pass reports failures. version.yml must NOT be updated so the upgrade prompt stays visible.

assertions.text: Does NOT call mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__record_upgrade when maintenance reported failures
Informs user that version was not recorded due to maintenance failures

evals.name: already-migrated-idempotent
evals.description: Config already at XDG location. migrate step runs but is a no-op. Full pass continues normally.

assertions.text: Still runs 'dev10x config migrate' even when config is already migrated (idempotent)
Proceeds to delegate full maintenance pass regardless of migrate output

evals.name: no-trigger-when-permissions-working
evals.description: Orchestrator context: permissions working, no version change detected. Skill should advise user rather than running a full pass.

assertions.text: Informs user that no upgrade cleanup is needed when permissions work and version is current

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the upgrade-cleanup skill

should_trigger.query: I just updated the plugin, now I'm getting permission prompts
should_trigger.rationale: Post-upgrade friction is the canonical trigger

should_trigger.query: config files are still in the old location after the update
should_trigger.rationale: Legacy config path is a trigger condition

should_not_trigger.query: run a quick bootstrap so the demo skills work
should_not_trigger.rationale: Bootstrap subset — use Dev10x:plugin-maintenance bootstrap instead

should_not_trigger.query: permissions are working fine, just want to check skill coverage

should_not_trigger.rationale: Read-only info query, no cleanup action
